meaning: adj.想不出办法的,偷懒的,无能的
examples: A person without ambition is said to be shiftless .
The “shiftless” Cherokees proudly did everything necessary.
Laziness brings on deep sleep, and the shiftless man goes hungry.
In retrospect, I was a sad little boy and a standard-issue, shiftless, egotistical, dejected teen-ager.
He perfected the art of buttboarding sitting on his skateboard and careering down hills with no helmet and no brakes and staged rock-throwing wars with other shiftless kids in empty lots.
